summary: Major model news: Gemini 3.1 Pro announced with 1M token context and 77.1% ARC-AGI-2 score. DeepSeek V4 rumors surface — leaked benchmarks show 90% HumanEval, could disrupt coding market. Claude Opus 4.6 and GPT-5.2 remain baseline. GitHub trending: awesome-llm-apps collection gaining traction for RAG patterns. No critical procurement alerts. Montreal research pipeline quiet today.

highlights.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro Announced
highlights.summary: Google's new Pro-tier model: 1M token context window, 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2, full multimodal (text/image/audio/video/code).
highlights.relevance: Evaluate against GPT-5.2 for client work. 1M context opens new use cases.
highlights.action: Benchmark Gemini 3.1 Pro on coding tasks vs Claude Opus 4.6

highlights.title: DeepSeek V4 Leaked Benchmarks
highlights.summary: Rumored 90% HumanEval, 1M token context. Expected mid-February. Could undercut OpenAI/Anthropic on price.
highlights.relevance: If real, major pricing pressure on frontier models. Watch for official drop.
highlights.action: Monitor for official announcement; prepare cost comparison

highlights.title: awesome-llm-apps Trending
highlights.summary: Collection of LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG patterns. Headroom Context Optimization claims 50-90% API cost reduction.
highlights.relevance: RAG patterns applicable to EventHorizonIQ knowledge base. Cost optimization relevant for all projects.
highlights.action: Review context compression techniques for our LLM pipelines

tech_research.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro Launch
tech_research.summary: Google's answer to GPT-5 speed + Claude reasoning. 1M context, multimodal native.
tech_research.relevance: Direct competitor to our baseline models. Must evaluate.

tech_research.title: DeepSeek V4 Threat
tech_research.summary: Chinese model rumored to outperform on coding with 90% HumanEval. 1M context.
tech_research.relevance: Pricing disruption potential. Gulf clients may prefer non-US options.

tech_research.title: ollama adds Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5
tech_research.summary: Local inference now supports Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma.
tech_research.relevance: Local inference options for bastion red-teaming pipeline.

business_opportunities.title: No new procurement alerts
business_opportunities.relevance: Continue monitoring SEAO, SAM.gov, UAE portals

research_montreal.title: Quiet day — no new lab announcements
